key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to rescan session files as a fallback (in seconds). File-change watching is real-time; this just catches anything the watcher misses.

key.name: aic-rate
key.description: Dollar value of a single AIC. 1 AIC = $0.01 by default.

key.name: collector-url
key.description: Base URL of the local OTLP usage collector. When set, the extension merges live (still-open) session usage and reconciles it against the on-disk shutdown totals by session id, surfacing any anomalies. Leave empty to disable and use on-disk data only.
